Module overrungl.core
Package overrungl

Class Configurations

java.lang.Object
overrungl.Configurations
public final class Configurations extends Object
The configurations for game library.
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233

  • Field Details

    • DEBUG

      public static final Configurations.Entry<Boolean> DEBUG
      Enable debug messages and prints to OverrunGL.apiLogger().

      The default value is false.

    • DEBUG_MEM_UTIL

      public static final Configurations.Entry<Boolean> DEBUG_MEM_UTIL
      Enable debug memory util to check memory leaks.

      The default value is false.

    • DEBUG_MEM_UTIL_FAST

      public static final Configurations.Entry<Boolean> DEBUG_MEM_UTIL_FAST
      Disable stacktrace in debug allocator.

      The default value is false.

    • GLFW_SYMBOL_LOOKUP

      public static final Configurations.Entry<Function<Supplier<SymbolLookup>,SymbolLookup>> GLFW_SYMBOL_LOOKUP
      The symbol lookup of GLFW. The returned value must not be null.

      The default value is null.

    • NFD_SYMBOL_LOOKUP

      public static final Configurations.Entry<Function<Supplier<SymbolLookup>,SymbolLookup>> NFD_SYMBOL_LOOKUP
      The symbol lookup of NFD. The returned value must not be null.

      The default value is null.

    • STB_SYMBOL_LOOKUP

      public static final Configurations.Entry<Function<Supplier<SymbolLookup>,SymbolLookup>> STB_SYMBOL_LOOKUP
      The symbol lookup of STB. The returned value must not be null.

      The default value is null.
